ogTitle: Upper Warrego vs Upper Yarraman: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Upper Warrego and Upper Yarraman.
heading: Upper Warrego vs Upper Yarraman — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Upper Warrego, Queensland and Upper Yarraman, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Upper Warrego has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Upper Yarraman (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Upper Warrego or Upper Yarraman safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Upper Warrego has a flood risk score of 22/100, while Upper Yarraman scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Upper Warrego scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Upper Yarraman scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Upper Warrego or Upper Yarraman?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Upper Warrego has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.92% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
